heading: Regulations
label: 603 Regulations
text: The Secretary concerned and the Secretary of Veterans Affairs shall prescribe regulations necessary to carry out this chapter.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)60337:353 (1st 28 words).(1st 28 words), ; , , .June 21, 1950, ch. 342, § 364 Stat. 249Pub. L. 86–145, § 273 Stat. 297Aug. 7, 1959The words “effectively” and “provisions of” are omitted as surplusage.
Amendments1989— substituted “Secretary of Veterans Affairs” for “Administrator of Veterans’ Affairs”.Pub. L. 101–189
